creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
(In reply to Steven Kreuzer from comment #3)

Thx for status.

Here the following two libftdi packages are installed for 0.9.0:

libftdi-0.20_4                 Library (using libusb) to talk to FTDI chips
libftdi1-1.1                   Library (using libusb) to talk to FTDI chips

FYI.
